title: JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT - 211info
text: JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT OF OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides age-appropriate programs to reinforce the values of workforce readiness, entrepreneurship, and financial literacy. Students are introduced to economic concepts, facts about the working world, and how education is relevant to the workplace. 7830 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-3pm Email (503) 238-6430 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 238-6430 Main phone Main phone (503) 238-6430 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Youth Business Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
